overall.description: Spider-Man walks through a waterfront memorial park at night, navigating between large stone monuments before proceeding along a riverside promenade with views of a suspension bridge and illuminated city skyline. The scene transitions from an open monument garden to a tree-lined path with modern residential towers, featuring scattered pedestrians and atmospheric street lighting typical of a high-fidelity video game environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: memorial monument garden with large stone monoliths

events.description: Spider-Man exits the dense stone monument area toward the open waterfront

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walks steadily through the monument garden, navigating between massive concrete blocks arranged in a grid pattern

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on a park bench near a street lamp

entered.detail: tall rectangular concrete monolith, part of a grid of memorial stones
classic black lamppost with warm yellow light illuminating the area
tree with sparse autumn foliage near the monument perimeter
wooden park bench with metal frame situated under the lamp post

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks through a memorial garden composed of large, austere stone monoliths arranged in a grid pattern. The area is sparsely populated with a few pedestrians resting on benches under warm street lamps. The sky is clear and dark, with the monument stones creating a maze-like environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with river view

events.description: suspension bridge and illuminated city skyline become visible across the water
Spider-Man turns slightly right to follow the curve of the waterfront path

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walks along the waterfront railing with the city skyline and suspension bridge visible in the distance across the water

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the railing looking out at the water

entered.detail: black metal railing running along the edge of the promenade overlooking the water
dark water surface reflecting city lights from the opposite shore
large illuminated suspension bridge spanning the river with city lights beyond
distant urban skyline with numerous lit windows and buildings

segments.scene_description: Exiting the monument garden, the scene opens to a wide waterfront promenade with a black metal railing overlooking the river. The suspension bridge and glittering city skyline become visible in the distance. Spider-Man follows the curved path along the water, passing a pedestrian observing the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy waterfront walkway with evening strollers

events.description: pedestrian density increases as Spider-Man enters a more populated section of the promenade
modern glass residential tower becomes visible on the left as the path curves

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man continues along the waterfront promenade, navigating through groups of pedestrians walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: woman in a green jacket carrying a bag walking toward the camera
man in dark clothing walking past Spider-Man on the right

entered.detail: tall contemporary residential building with illuminated windows and glass facade

segments.scene_description: The promenade becomes busier with moderate pedestrian traffic walking in both directions. The suspension bridge remains visible to the left while a modern glass residential tower emerges on the left side. Street lamps continue to line the path, casting warm light on the paved walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined waterfront path with modern residential buildings

events.description: path becomes enclosed by a line of deciduous trees with the modern building prominent on the left

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walks through a tree-lined section of the promenade with tall modern buildings on the left and the water on the right, passing pedestrians on the path

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in a green sweater standing near a bench looking at the water

entered.detail: row of trees with autumn foliage lining the left side of the path
green and black public trash bins near the tree line

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a more enclosed, tree-lined section of the waterfront path. The modern glass tower looms large on the left, partially obscured by autumn trees. The suspension bridge and distant skyline fade from view as the path continues along the water's edge with scattered pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a structured memorial garden into an open waterfront promenade and finally into a sheltered, tree-lined urban path. It begins by weaving through a grid of austere stone monoliths under warm street lamps and a dark, clear sky. As the camera exits the monument garden, the scene opens onto a wide promenade with a black metal railing, revealing a glittering city skyline and a distant suspension bridge. The path then becomes more crowded with pedestrians as a modern glass residential tower emerges on the left, while the lighting remains warm along the paved walkway. Finally, the environment shifts into a more enclosed section where autumn trees partially obscure the towering glass building and the distant skyline fades from view.
